elements.text: "Classes are being skipped. Work is ignored. Students are spending hours in front of the computer in utter fascination. Thefacebook.com craze has swept through campus."
An online directory that connects students, alumni, faculty, and staff through social networks at colleges and universities — built on courses, friendships, and campus life.
Profiles, social graph, and campus networking

items.text: Favorite music, books, movies, and quotes
Linked school news articles mentioning the user
Shortest connection path to any other user

elements.text: Within each school, users navigate the network through three discovery tools: a random people browser, complete course rosters for any class, and a full-parameter search engine. Every friendship requires mutual confirmation. The platform automatically visualizes each user's social graph and traces the shortest connection path between any two people on the network. Separate friendship lists extend the same graph across every school in the directory.
15 million students. $85 billion in purchasing power.
The most valuable demographic with the least targeted advertising.

There are 15 million college students in the United States with a combined purchasing power exceeding $85 billion annually. They are early adopters, brand-formers, and active job seekers — making financial decisions for the first time. Until now, no advertising platform has been able to reach them on the basis of what they study, where they live on campus, or who they know.

college students
in the United States
How $85 billion in college spending breaks down annually
Usage, retention, and growth since launch
"I have a new addiction. It is powerful. It is disturbing. It is thefacebook.com."
10,000 new members joined in the first week of April 2004.
Daily unique users and pageviews are growing proportionally with the user base. Growth is not slowing.
Targeting parameters, ad formats, and campaign services
Targeting built on declared identity, not inferred behavior.

thefacebook.com ad targeting draws on data no other platform has access to: students' declared academic identity — school, courses, concentration, class year — combined with explicit social graph connections and verified institutional affiliations. Campaigns can reach users at their dorm, work, home, or library, and can be targeted on any combination of 17 parameters. We work directly with advertisers to identify the most effective placements for each campaign goal.
17 targeting parameters — combinable on any campaign

"The wonderful thing about The Facebook is its ability to connect so many people through so many different avenues, including courses, interests, houses, politics, concentration, and favourite movies."
